element_introduction_order.mastery_context: High-damage combo finishers and tournament progression
Fighting style and appearance change via throwing moves; tournament finals

element_introduction_order.element: Boss character Oume Gōketsuji (unplayable, special mechanics)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Culmination of tournament ladder; superhuman abilities and mysterious attacks

typical_relief_triggers: Winning a match in tournament progression
typical_tension_triggers: Boss character Oume introduces superhuman mechanics
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating tournament ladder with cumulative difficulty; transformation mechanic adds dynamic pacing shifts within individual matches

difficulty_curve.early_game: Early tournament opponents introduce basic mechanics; learning curve for double jump, run attacks, and character-specific move sets
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Mid-tournament opponents demand special attack execution and spacing mastery; transformation mechanics encountered
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final tournament matches escalate with superhuman boss mechanics; Oume Gōketsuji presents mysterious attack patterns and heightened stat distribution
notable_spikes: First encounter with character transformation (opponent mid-match style change)
Tournament final vs. Oume Gōketsuji (unplayable boss with unique mechanics)

notable_level_patterns.description: Sequential opponent encounters in single-elimination format; each victory advances player toward clan leadership; escalating difficulty through opponent selection
Each playable character (8 total) has unique win quotes for each defeated opponent and distinct ending sequence; creates replay value and narrative variation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Post-match victory screens and ending sequences

notable_level_patterns.description: Select characters can transform mid-match via throwing move execution; changes fighting style and appearance; adds dynamic unpredictability to match pacing

sources_used: wikipedia: Power Instinct series overview, gameplay mechanics, character descriptions
